stdout:
Usage: gaia pkg add [OPTIONS] [PACKAGE]

 Install a registered, LKM-backed, or local Gaia knowledge package.

 Resolves ``<package>`` against the gaia registry (default:
 ``SiliconEinstein/gaia-registry`` on GitHub), runs ``uv add`` on the
 resolved ``git+<repo>@<sha>`` spec, and best-effort downloads the
 upstream ``beliefs.json`` into ``.gaia/dep_beliefs/<import_name>.json``
 so foreign-node priors flow into local inference. Must be run from
 within a Gaia knowledge package (``pyproject.toml`` carrying a
 ``tool.gaia`` table).

 LKM paper refs/flags fetch the paper graph, generate a local Gaia package
 under ``.gaia/lkm_packages/``, compile it, and add it as an editable
 dependency with ``uv add --editable``.

 ``--local <path>`` adds an existing local Gaia package directory as a local
 dependency. This keeps ``gaia pkg add`` package-centric: upstream research
 adapters can generate partial or full source packages, then add those
 packages through the same local package contract.

 ``--version`` pins a specific release; omit to take the latest
 registered version.

 Example:

 .. code-block:: bash

     gaia pkg add galileo-falling-bodies-gaia
     gaia pkg add mendel-v0-5-gaia --version 0.1.0
     gaia pkg add --local .gaia/lkm_packages/generated-source-package
     gaia pkg add --lkm-index bohrium --lkm-paper 811827932371615744
     gaia pkg add --lkm-index bohrium --lkm-claim gcn_579430355a0e4bbd
     gaia pkg add lkm:bohrium:paper:811827932371615744

в•­в”Ђ Arguments в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚   package      [PACKAGE]  Package name (e.g., galileo-falling-bodies-gaia)   в”‚
в”‚                           or LKM ref (lkm:<index>:paper:<id> /               в”‚
в”‚                           lkm:<index>:claim:<id>).                           в”‚
в•°в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•Ї
в•­в”Ђ Options в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚ --version                 -v      TEXT  Specific version                     в”‚
в”‚ --registry                        TEXT  Registry GitHub repo                 в”‚
в”‚                                         [default:                            в”‚
в”‚                                         SiliconEinstein/gaia-registry]       в”‚
в”‚ --lkm-index,--lkm-server          TEXT  Configured LKM index id for          в”‚
в”‚                                         --lkm-paper / --lkm-claim.           в”‚
в”‚                                         [default: bohrium]                   в”‚
в”‚ --lkm-paper                       TEXT  Materialize this LKM paper id as a   в”‚
в”‚                                         local Gaia package and add it.       в”‚
в”‚ --lkm-claim                       TEXT  Resolve this LKM claim id to its     в”‚
в”‚                                         backing paper package.               в”‚
в”‚ --local                           TEXT  Add this local Gaia package          в”‚
в”‚                                         directory as a dependency.           в”‚
в”‚ --target                          TEXT  Path to the Gaia knowledge package   в”‚
в”‚                                         to add the dependency to (default:   в”‚
в”‚                                         cwd). Matches the --target           в”‚
в”‚                                         convention used by `gaia author`     в”‚
в”‚                                         verbs so the whole package lifecycle в”‚
в”‚                                         runs from one place.                 в”‚
в”‚                                         [default: .]                         в”‚
в”‚ --help                                  Show this message and exit.          в”‚
